title: ArguAgent: AI-Supported Real-Time Grouping for Productive Argumentation in STEM Classrooms
summary: Argumentation is a core practice in STEM education, but its productivity depends on who participates and how they interact. Higher-achieving students often dominate the talk and decision-making, while lower-achieving peers may disengage,...
